name: Zeo ScientifiX, Inc.
business: Zeo ScientifiX, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company developing innovative biological therapeutics for degenerative diseases and regenerative medicine. Its principal products include Zofin, derived from amniotic fluid, and Patient Pure X (PPX), an autologous biologic from patient's blood. The company sells its products to doctors and clinics in the healthcare industry, and has recently expanded into topical aesthetic applications.

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company principally focusing on the development of innovative biological therapeutics for the treatment of degenerative diseases and regenerative medicine.
the Company has recently developed and begun to distribute additional products that incorporate its proprietary ingredients for products to be used in topical aesthetic applications

catalysts.event: Florida stem cell therapy law SB 1768 effective
catalysts.sentence: The state of Florida enacted a new stem cell therapy law, effective July 1, 2025 ( SB 1768 ).

tamClaims.claim: The global regenerative treatment market value is expected to grow to approximately $174.72 billion by 2032.
tamClaims.sentence: According to Precedence Research, the global regenerative treatment market value, in which cell therapy operates, is expected to grow to ~$174.72 billion by 2032 with a projected growth rate of 22.8% annually (2023-2032).
